prompt: 幫我在 d:\gemini\ 裝 gemini

input.command: node --version 2>&1; echo "---npm---"; npm --version 2>&1; echo "---npx---"; npx --version 2>&1; echo "---dir---"; ls -la /d/gemini 2>&1 || echo "d:\\gemini does not exist"; echo "---existing gemini---"; where gemini 2>&1 || echo "no gemini on PATH"
npm view @google/gemini-cli version bin engines 2>&1 | head -40
mkdir -p /d/gemini && cd /d/gemini && npm init -y >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "init ok" && npm install @google/gemini-cli 2>&1 | tail -15
input.description: Create dir and install Gemini CLI locally

input.command: cd /d/gemini && ls node_modules/.bin/gemini* 2>&1; echo "---version---"; node node_modules/@google/gemini-cli/dist/index.js --version 2>&1 | head -3 || ./node_modules/.bin/gemini --version 2>&1 | head -3

input.description: Run Gemini CLI via bundle entrypoint
